contents.title: Getting Started with Product Fruits
contents.content:
## Welcome

This guide helps you get started with Product Fruits in minutes.

### Step 1: Install the SDK

Add the JavaScript snippet to your application.

### Step 2: Identify Users

Call the identify method with your user data.
